zh.Bude, Cornwall, England: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾布德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Whalesburgh於1286年出生在英國可瓦爾時，他的父親Marcus de Whalesborough11283歲，母親Matilda Arundell36歲。他於1309年之前與Joan Carminow結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1328年8月21日在他的家鄉享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Whalesburgh于1286年出生在英国可瓦爾时，他的父亲Marcus de Whalesborough11283岁，母亲Matilda Arundell36岁。他于1309年之前与Joan Carminow结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1328年8月21日在他的家乡享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Whalesburgh was born in 1286, in Cornwall, England, his father, Marcus de Whalesborough, was 11283 and his mother, Matilda Arundell, was 36. He married Joan Carminow before 1309. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 21 August 1328, in his hometown, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Whalesburgh est né en 1286, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Marcus de Whalesborough, avait 11283 ans et sa mère, Matilda Arundell, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Joan Carminow avant 1309. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 21 août 1328, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Whalesburgh 1286 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Marcus de Whalesborough 11283 und seine Mutter Matilda Arundell 36. Er hat vor 1309 Joan Carminow geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 21. August 1328 im Alter von 42 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Whalesburgh è nato il nel 1286 nel Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Marcus de Whalesborough, aveva 11283 anni e il suo madre, Matilda Arundell, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Joan Carminow prima del 1309. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 21 agosto 1328, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Whalesburghが1286年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Marcus de Whalesboroughは11283歳，母Matilda Arundellは36歳であった。1309年以前にJoan Carminowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1328年8月21日に故郷で42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Whalesburgh(이)가 1286년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Marcus de Whalesborough(은)는 11283세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda Arundell(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1309년 이전 Joan Carminow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1328년 8월 21일 그의 고향에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Bude, Cornwall, England: Porthbud, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Whalesburgh nasceu em 1286, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Marcus de Whalesborough, tinha 11283 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Arundell, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Carminow antes 1309. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de agosto de 1328, em sua cidade natal, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Whalesburgh родился в 1286 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Marcus de Whalesborough было 11283 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda Arundell, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Carminow перед 1309 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 21 августа 1328 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William de Whalesburgh nació en 1286, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Marcus de Whalesborough, tenía 11283 años y su mamá, Matilda Arundell, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Joan Carminow antes de 1309. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 21 de agosto de 1328, en su pueblo, a la edad de 42 años.
